steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content:
Both sentences express the same pattern—Coleridge-Taylor actively demonstrating his African heritage.

He emphasized his ancestry verbally (calling himself Anglo-African) and musically (incorporating African sounds).

This is a reinforcing relationship, not a contrasting one.

steps.title: Apply the relationship
steps.content:
“In addition,” correctly signals continuation and reinforcement of the pattern. The other three (However, Actually, Regardless) signal contrast, surprise, or independence.

This matches choice A — A is correct.
